reviews.comment:
muy lentos una pena  por el turismo y por la gente de la zona.  4 autos y tardo media hora para atender y cobrar 23/6  13.05 hs. menos mal q no fuimos al horario del corte de turno.

(Translated by Google)
Very slow, a shame for tourism and the locals. Four cars and it took half an hour to be served and paid. June 23rd, 1:05 PM. Luckily we didn't go at the end of the shift.

reviews.comment:
45 minutos esperando q atiendan  teniendo UN vehiculo delante mio mientras los playeros  charlaban y reian en la oficina......muy mala atencion....
Como siempre....

(Translated by Google)
I waited 45 minutes to be served, even though there was a car in front of me, while the attendants chatted and laughed in the office... terrible service... As always...
